Common Questions

What scale does the platform support?

The stream control platform is designed for horizontal scale. From a handful of endpoints to enterprise-wide deployments with hundreds of devices.

Is there a self-hosted option?

Yes. The core platform can be deployed on-premises or in your private cloud environment. Contact us to discuss deployment architecture.

When will AI services be available?

AI integration is on our Phase 03 roadmap, targeted for 2026. We are actively taking expressions of interest for early access.
